title: tragacantha arbuscula
intro: Tragacantha arbuscula, also known as French broom, is a shrub-like legume native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and lower fever. The plant's extracts have been found to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help prevent infections and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha arbuscula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as to soothe digestive problems.
